name: Oriental Ginger Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 8 Unshelled raw jumbo shrimp, thawed if frozen
1 Piece ginger root, peeled and grated (1")
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the shrimp, leaving the tail shells on. Make a small incision along the spines. Remove the black spinal cord from the shrimp.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, corn oil, and water. Stir in ginger, garlic, and chili sauce, then beat well.
3. Stiffly whisk the egg white, then gently fold it into the batter until evenly combined.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a deep-fat fryer or saucepan to 375°F (190°C). Ensure that a half-inch cube of day-old bread browns in 40 seconds.
5. Hold each shrimp by its tail and dip it into the batter, then lower it into the hot oil. Fry for 3 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels. Garnish with green onion daisy and bell pepper strips, and serve hot.
